positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u23,axiom,
    fluffy != olive_garden).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    olive_garden != b1).

cnf(u30,axiom,
    managed_building(sK0)).

cnf(u32,negated_conjecture,
    ~allowed_to_move_in_with_pet(tom,fluffy,olive_garden)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    tom != fluffy).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    tom != b1).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    tom != olive_garden).

cnf(u34,negated_conjecture,
    ~allows_pets(olive_garden)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    managed_building(b1)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    managed_building(olive_garden)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    allows_pets(sK0)).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    allows_pets(b1)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    fluffy != b1).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    allowed_to_move_in_with_pet(X0,X1,X2) | ~managed_building(X2) | ~allows_pets(X2)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define cat(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define pet(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for negative
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u23,axiom,
    olive_garden != b1).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    tom != b1).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    fluffy != b1).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    tom != olive_garden).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    fluffy != olive_garden).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    tom != fluffy).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define cat(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define pet(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define allows_pets(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define managed_building(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define allowed_to_move_in_with_pet(X0,X1,X2) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
